title: Why didnt they just lanch em them into the sun
display_title: Why didnt they just lanch em them into the sun
wikitext:
[]: Why didn't they just lanch 'em them into the sun...             Quote Post by Boredom » Sun Dec 06, 2009 11:56 am If contact with Adam or Lilith would have caused 3I, why didnt they just sent them into the sun or something?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Dec 06, 2009 11:58 am Because Seele and Gendo both had plans to start 3I for their own purposes once the Angels were defeated. Also, presumably if Adam and Lilith were destroyed while the Angels were still around, Nerv would lose the significant advantage of knowing more or less where all of them are going to show up, by using Lilith as bait to lure them into Tokyo-3 where all the stuff to fight them with is.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Dec 06, 2009 1:02 pm If contact with Adam or Lilith would have caused 3I, why didnt they just sent them into the sun or something?

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Sun Dec 06, 2009 1:19 pm More or less explains why above but wanted to put my two cents in. Essentially if they did this no one would be able to activate 3rd impact, and become a being unto god and advance further up the chain of existence in the universe. You can look at the situation like a giant rat race between the lilim including us to be the one to cause it and better themselves. If we simply cast it into the sun the race ends in a stale mate and then you just have to deal with the angels and have no way to fight them off. Even if they had the 3 eva units, they would run out of lcl eventually, no more Rei's or Kwaru's, and if all 3 got destroyed somehow they could not make anymore units to defend themselves unless they kept cells of Lilith which in theory could just redevelop into a full physical existence again because of the regenerative properties so you cant cheat like that. Simply put Seele and Nerves goals would both cease to be possible, and man kind could not advance as well as the angels, cursing all lilim to failure. It would probably open a whole new can of worms. Also they could of probably pooled the resources and launch Adam and Lilith it into the sun, but Lilith would be hard but Adam would be pretty easy. It was just impossible to recover the lance since it was already free floating in space and ultimately rested on the white moon. Pulling something out of the moon then pulling it out of the gravity and into our orbit after covering the distance between the earth and the moon would be really hard.

[]:             Quote Post by jayngfet » Mon Dec 14, 2009 9:01 pm The angels are humanities chance to advance. Even with 3I averted with the S2 organs humans have a limitless power supply on their hands. They gain godlike power to rebuild dead civilizations, the opportunity for FTL travel ala First Ancestral Race. With the promises the SOL's bring WHO could resist?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Dec 14, 2009 10:13 pm Because then there would be no story.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Mon Dec 14, 2009 11:25 pm Defectron wrote: If contact with Adam or Lilith would have caused 3I, why didnt they just sent them into the sun or something?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Dec 14, 2009 11:30 pm Launching it to the sun would also take a considerable amount of time just traveling. Do you think they would risk either Seed of Life just floating around in space for several months unprotected (and even if it had protection, it'd be very minimal due to the lack of technology) when Angels like Arael or Sahaquiel can get it with little to no effort at all?

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Wed Dec 16, 2009 7:52 pm but due to the lack of a dominant soul meaning neither adam or liliths soul being present in the bodies that were being carried to the sun they wouldn't be able to trigger anything anyways so that argument is invalid. So long as Rei or Kwaru wasn't on the shuttle they would be fine.
